guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 50. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_fl: Point to the big FL and say: flflfl. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_gl: Now point to the big GL and say: glglgl.

parent_story: A flower waved like a flag. A globe sat on the glass table.
